content.en:
The power of the Truncation Finger had already surpassed Ye Tian's most powerful Infinite Extreme Dao Control Technique, but it was only several times more powerful, and it had not yet reached the point of exaggeration.

But Ye Tian's truncation finger is just to meet the qualification standard of the Infinite Extreme Domain Technique, and it can continue to improve in the future.

Once it is continuously refined to a very high level, the power of this Infinite Extreme Domain Technique will be extremely powerful.

"After the initial training of the truncated finger, my current strength has improved again, at least not too far from the level of the Hurricane Great Ancestor!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the following years, Ye Tian practiced amputated fingers while recasting his life.

Unconsciously, more than three million realms have passed for the first year.

At this time, the power of the severed finger has increased several times again, and he is about to complete the twelfth life reforge.

He had a feeling that twelve life reforges might be his limit.

For this breakthrough, Ye Tian prepared for a long time, collected a large amount of foreign silver sand in the empty galaxy, and then fused it into different golden sands, and then refined them into countless golden dragon stones.

Immediately, he devoured a large amount of golden dragon stone to attack this shackle.

After a long period of continuous refining, Ye Tian's twelfth life reforge was about to be completed.

Rumble!!!!!

The shackles were torn apart, and the countless golden dragon stones around them were devoured into Ye Tian's body in a short period of time, prompting the twelfth life reforge to be completed quickly.

I don't know how long it has been, but Ye Tian's twelfth life reforge has been completely transformed.

"Twelve life reforges, this is something that other Great Ancestors don't dare to imagine at all!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And after completing the twelve life reforges, Ye Tian's body was already unimaginably strong, and even the immeasurable will had reached a thousand scales.

Not only that, but his Infinite Body had risen a step in the Perfection Realm, but it was still far from the Extreme Realm, and he could only wait until he broke through to a high-level Infinite Lifeform and then use a large amount of Hailou Heavenly Gold to have any hope of raising the Infinite Body to the Extreme Realm.

Twelve life recasts, immeasurable will breaking a thousand scales, comprehending the immeasurable extreme way, and mastering an immeasurable extreme domain technique, it can be said that Ye Tian has reached the true limit that is difficult for middle-level immeasurable lifeforms to reach.

Next, if he wants to quickly improve his strength, he can only break through to become a high-level immeasurable lifeform.

"Twelve life reforges is my limit, even if I use more golden dragon stones, I can't do the thirteenth life reforge, there is no need to waste any more time, when the twelve life reforges are more stable, I will be ready to impact the realm of high-level immeasurable life forms!"

Ye Tian thought so.

Subsequently, it took him some more time to completely stabilize the twelve life reforges, and then he was ready to attack the high-level immeasurable life form realm.

Truncate the skytower.

Ye Tian was in retreat here, and he had prepared a large number of resources, some of which were transferred from the True Mountain Territory.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to impact the realm of high-level immeasurable life forms.

The impact of middle-level immeasurable lifeforms on high-level immeasurable lifeforms is to break the boundaries of life, which is essentially different from life reforge.

Life reforged is a reforged from the original, not a break of boundaries.

Now that Ye Tian has completed twelve life reforges, forcibly breaking the boundary is very simple for him, and his body can definitely withstand it easily.

Airplanes!!!

Countless resources were absorbed and absorbed by Ye Tian, as the energy for him to break through the boundary, and the endless energy of the outside world was also absorbed by him.

As time passed, Ye Tian's boundaries were gradually torn apart.

A certain moment.

Rumble!!!!

The boundary was broken by Ye Tian, and the life level began to jump to the realm of high-level immeasurable life forms, and the body began to transform unimaginably.

His aura grew stronger and stronger, increasing almost every instant.

And Ye Tian's aura was so strong that it couldn't even cover up the formation of the truncated heavenly tower, and it directly diffused out, enveloping the interception of Black Mountain and the surrounding territory.

Whew!!

One of the Dao Ancestors of the Nine-Story Building came to the vicinity, and they were all shocked by this force.

"What a terrifying power, much more powerful than our power!"

Dongchen Daozu exclaimed.

At this time, the Nine Xuan Dao Ancestor, who had already broken through to a mid-level immeasurable life form, was also surprised: "This should be the breath of a high-level immeasurable life form, anyway, I think the power of this breath is far beyond me, I can't judge how powerful this breath is, just the slightest leakage is enough to make the mid-level immeasurable life body tremble!"

"This should be the Endless Dao Ancestor who has broken through to a high-level immeasurable lifeform, and now we have a high-level immeasurable lifeform born in the Silent Black Sea!"

"It's indeed a great thing, I didn't expect that the Silent Black Sea doesn't even have a few middle-level immeasurable lifeforms now, but a high-level immeasurable lifeform was born, and when other forces know about it, they will definitely be dumbfounded!"

"Endless Dao Ancestor is indeed too demonic, it is said that the clone of Endless Dao Ancestor has gone to the Xuanqi Territory to break through, but unfortunately our strength is too weak, once we go to the Xuanqi Territory, if our identity is exposed, I am afraid that we will not live long!"

Soon, the other forces also knew that Ye Tian had broken through and become a high-level immeasurable lifeform, and they were all dumbfounded.

Some top forces have not yet given birth to a middle-level immeasurable lifeform, but Ye Tian has already become a high-level immeasurable lifeform, what a huge gap this is!

......

"Finally broke through to the realm of high-level immeasurable lifeforms!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

His current strength is much stronger than in the past, definitely much stronger than the Hurricane Great Ancestor, but it should still be inferior to the level of the Void Whale Overlord.

"It's time to release the Blood Ancestor!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He had signed an agreement with the Raccoon Blood Ancestor at the beginning, and when he broke through to the high-level immeasurable life form realm, he would release the Raccoon Blood Ancestor, and if he didn't fulfill it, his cultivation would be affected to a certain extent.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian went directly to the time and space sealed by the Blood Ancestor and met the Blood Ancestor again.

Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian passed through the crack and fell into this sealed space-time, and soon came to the front of the Blood Ancestor.

At this time, the Bloody Great Ancestor was extremely surprised when he saw Ye Tian.

"Little guy, have you broken through to the realm of high-level immeasurable life forms?"

The Blood Ancestor was extremely shocked.

The last time he saw Ye Tian, he knew that Ye Tian's potential was very high, and he had the hope of becoming a high-level immeasurable life form realm, but it would definitely take endless years.

After all, if Ye Tian wanted to break through to the realm of high-level immeasurable life forms, he had to join a powerful force, and it would take a long time to get the attention of that force, so as to obtain resource cultivation, and then complete nine life recasting after endless years, so that he could step into the realm of high-level immeasurable life forms.

But how long has it been, Ye Tian has completed the breakthrough, this is simply incredible!

Even if he tried his best to help Ye Tian cultivate, he wouldn't be able to break through to a high-level immeasurable lifeform so quickly!

"It's incredible!"

The Blood Ancestor muttered.
